designer_profile.name: Alexandre Cosme
designer_profile.vibe: Elegant, exclusive, clean, not overcrowded. Bilingual (PT/EN).

rules: NEVER use pure white (#FFFFFF) or pure black (#000000).
Maintain a warm, sophisticated off-white/espresso contrast to give an editorial feel.
Avoid default fonts like Inter or Roboto.
Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for high-impact, modern headings.
Never center text by default. Use left-aligned layouts to create visual tension.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous negative space to feel like a premium magazine or gallery.

section_sequence.purpose: First impression. Name + Role + Abstract elegant floating element.
section_sequence.layout: Massive left-aligned typography. Use 'hero_abstract_shape' image overlapping slightly to break the grid.

section_sequence.purpose: Showcase portfolio pieces immediately to build authority.
section_sequence.layout: Asymmetrical 'Tetris' grid. Mix portrait and landscape aspect ratios. Large gaps (gap-8 or gap-12).

section_sequence.purpose: Introduce Alexandre and his diverse skill set.
section_sequence.layout: 2-column layout. Left: Short impactful bio. Right: List of services (AR, 3D, Graphic Design, Photography, Web, Video) with 1px border separators.
Minimalist list. Year on the left, Role on the right, Company below. Clean, typographic.
Massive CTA text. Web3Forms integration. Social links.

motion_and_interaction.cursor: Custom dot cursor (mix-blend-difference) that expands when hovering over clickable elements.
motion_and_interaction.scroll: Smooth scrolling via Lenis. Subtle parallax on images.
hover_states: Images: Subtle scale-up (1.05) inside a hidden-overflow container.
Buttons: 'Fill' animation or arrow translating slightly right on hover.

navigation.style: Sticky, glassmorphism but tinted warm (backdrop-blur-md bg-[#F4F2EE]/80). 1px subtle bottom border (#DCD8CF).

buttons.style: No heavy background. Mostly 1px solid border (#1C1B1A) with dark text. On hover, background fills with #1C1B1A and text becomes #F4F2EE.

cards.style: Cardless design. Rely on images and typography for structure, not boxes. If a container is needed, use a subtle 1px border (#DCD8CF) with no shadow.

rules: Do not use placeholder text for images. Use the provided URLs below.
Use grayscale filters on hover for a stylish reveal, or keep them colored but muted.

images.description: Generated sophisticated minimal abstract 3D shape for the hero background to add luxury feel.
Concentric arches abstract render. Use for 3D/AR placeholder project.
Surfboards at Ericeira beach sunset. Use for Sports Photography placeholder project.
Blank white business cards on pastel orange. Use for Graphic Design / Branding placeholder project.
Creative abstract pink geometric shapes. Use for Web Design placeholder project.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI in React with Tailwind CSS.
Import 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'Satoshi' via Fontshare or a standard webfont CDN. Do not fallback to Inter.
For the bilingual feature, create a simple state toggle that switches the text content between PT and EN.
Integrate Web3Forms for the contact section.
Ensure the layout feels 'empty' but intentional. Let the large typography and beautiful images breathe.
The Hero section should be very bold with 'Alexandre Cosme' in huge font (h1) and 'Multimedia & AR Specialist' in a subtle overline.
Project cards should not look like standard Shadcn cards. Just a large image that scales slightly on hover, with a clean title and category below it.
